chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 85 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.389/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.390/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.08.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.4, which is taken on record. Mr. Jawad Hussain Rajper, Advocate holding brief for Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, learned counsel for the petitioner and submits that since the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served, therefore, under instructions, he does not press the same, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
